allow: Bash(python3 -c "import inspect; from fastmcp.server.auth import RemoteAuthProvider; print\(inspect.signature\(RemoteAuthProvider.__init__\)\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import inspect; from fastmcp.server.auth import RemoteAuthProvider; print\(inspect.signature\(RemoteAuthProvider.__init__\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from fastmcp.server.auth.providers.jwt import JWTVerifier; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(JWTVerifier\)\)")
